style_effects: Gentle sparkling dust trails drift lazily around Koffing, shimmering with iridescent pastel hues of pink and lavender. A soft, pearlescent glow emanates from its body, casting a warm amber light that refracts through delicate petal-shaped aura particles floating in slow, circular motions. The atmosphere is bathed in a serene, ethereal luminescence with faint musical note vibrations visible as subtle ripples in the air, evoking a sense of calm and wonder. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
